Stuck right now?

Broken down at the roadside?

Don't worry — we do this every day. Here's exactly what to do while we're on our way:

  1. Get somewhere safe. Pull over, put your hazard lights on, and stand well away from moving traffic.
  2. Call or WhatsApp us. Tell us where you are — a postcode or a what3words pin is perfect — and your tyre size if you have it.
  3. Sit tight. We'll head straight to you, usually within 30–60 minutes, and talk you through anything you need in the meantime.
Call 07869 572503 WhatsApp us Answered 24/7, 365 days a year

Home, work or stuck at the roadside — our mobile units carry everything needed to sort you on the spot.

Safe, standard repairs

All puncture repairs carried out to British Standard BS AU 159 — safe, permanent and built to last.

Eco-friendly disposal

Fully-insured, responsible recycling of your old tyres for a small fee — saving you a trip to the tip.

Easy payment

All major credit and debit cards via secure mobile chip & PIN, plus cash on completion.

How it works

Back on the road in three steps

1

Call, WhatsApp or quote

Ring or message us 24/7, or fill in the quick form with your location, vehicle and tyre size. We'll confirm a price.

2

We come to you

Our fully-equipped mobile unit heads straight to your home, workplace or roadside — typically within 30–60 minutes.

3

Fitted & sorted

We fit, repair or balance on the spot, take payment by card or cash, and you're safely back on the road.

We fit all major tyre brands — from premium to budget-friendly

FAQs

Frequently asked questions

How quickly can you get to me?
We pride ourselves on a rapid response. For emergency call-outs within Middlesbrough, we typically arrive within 30–60 minutes. Response times for surrounding Teesside areas may vary slightly depending on traffic and your exact location.
What are your operating hours?
We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Tyre emergencies don't stick to a 9-to-5 schedule, and neither do we.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, etc.) via our secure mobile chip & PIN machine, as well as cash payments upon completion of the work.
Can you fit tyres I've bought online myself?
Yes, absolutely. We offer a mobile fitting-only service for tyres you've purchased elsewhere. Just let us know when you book and we'll quote for the fitting, a new valve and wheel balancing.
Are your puncture repairs safe?
Yes. All of our puncture repairs are carried out to the strict British Standard BS AU 159. This ensures the repair is safe, permanent, and will last for the remaining legal life of the tyre.
What happens to my old tyre?
We offer a fully-insured, environmentally-friendly disposal service for a small fee, ensuring your old tyres are recycled responsibly — and saving you a trip to the tip.
Do I need to be with my vehicle for the fitting?
We prefer you to be present to hand over the keys and locking wheel nut key, but we can be flexible if you're at work or home. As long as our technician can safely access the vehicle, we can often complete the job — just discuss your circumstances when you call.
What information do I need to provide?
To get to you quickly, please have ready: your exact location (address, postcode or what3words), your vehicle's make & model, your tyre size (e.g. 205/55 R16), and whether you have the locking wheel nut key.
